content.query:
-- 1. Create the File Format (tells SQL how to read the CSV)
CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT [CSV_Format]
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS (
        FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
        STRING_DELIMITER = '"',
        FIRST_ROW = 2, -- Skips the header row
        USE_TYPE_DEFAULT = FALSE
    )
);

-- 2. Create the Data Source (points to your specific container)
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE [ADS_Container1]
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'https://vanistorageadls.dfs.core.windows.net/container1'
);

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.CallerDetails (
    [call_id] NVARCHAR(50),
    [caller_id] BIGINT,
    [receiver_id] BIGINT,
    [duration] INT,
    [call_type] NVARCHAR(20),
    [tower_id] NVARCHAR(20),
    [timestamp] DATETIME2,
    [cost] DECIMAL(10, 2)
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'landing-zone/cust_hist_1.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = [ADS_Container1], -- Must match the name created in Step 1
    FILE_FORMAT = [CSV_Format]      -- Must match the name created in Step 1
);
